channel.title: religion on Kfkq
channel.description: Recent content in religion on Kfkq

item.title: Faith is Not Blind Conformity
item.description: Abstract: The modern phenomenon has already created stereotypes of what faith and religion are, often assumed to be blind conformity or merely following traditions that undermine reason. In fact, true faith only exists after certainty arises, and one cannot claim faith is valid without certainty, both in a rational and spiritual sense. Not many religions encourage knowledge, reason, and breaking away from authoritative traditions, but Islam does.
